name: Firefly Swarm
description: A swarm of chaotic, glowing fireflies that avoid your cursor as you move through them.

schema.label: Firefly Count
schema.description: Number of glowing fireflies in the sky.

schema.label: Movement Speed
schema.description: How fast the fireflies fly autonomously.

schema.label: Avoidance Distance
schema.description: How close your cursor needs to be before they start flying away.

schema.label: Evasion Agility
schema.description: How quickly they dart away from your cursor.

schema.label: Glow Intensity
schema.description: The size of the glowing aura around each firefly.
